# Release Notes for v0.0.1-alpha

## Overview
- Initial release of PipeDream
- Provides tools for interaction with Power Platform, Azure DevOps, and PowerShell

## Features
- Get-DataverseAuthToken: Function to get authentication token for Dataverse

## Installation
- Follow the instructions in the README.md to install the module

## Usage
- Refer to the README.md for usage examples

## Known Issues
- No known issues at this time

## Future Improvements
- Additional functions for enhanced interaction with Power Platform and Azure DevOps
